summary: Iteration 34 - Admin Dashboard Upgrade. All 31 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. Tested: 1) GET /api/admin/analytics returns total_streams, week_streams, total_stream_revenue, platform_breakdown, country_breakdown, top_artists, monthly_trend, active_artists. 2) GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/detail returns user, stats, releases, platform_breakdown, country_breakdown, weekly_trends, goals. 3) PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id}/profile updates user profile fields. 4) All admin endpoints require authentication (401 without token). 5) Frontend admin dashboard shows 6 stat cards, Platform Streams chart, Top Markets chart, Top Artists list with links, Monthly Streams trend, Users by Plan, This Week activity. 6) Admin Users page has View link per user row. 7) Admin User Detail page shows all required sections and Edit Profile form works correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: AdminProfileUpdate model correctly defines all profile fields (name, artist_name, bio, genre, country, website, spotify_url, apple_music_url, instagram, twitter, role, plan, status)
admin_get_user_detail endpoint properly aggregates data from users, artist_profiles, releases, stream_events, goals, collaborations, presave_campaigns collections
admin_update_user_profile correctly splits updates between users collection (name, artist_name, role, plan, status) and artist_profiles collection (bio, genre, country, website, social links)
admin_platform_analytics aggregates platform-wide data from stream_events collection
All admin endpoints properly use require_admin() for authentication
Frontend AdminDashboardPage.jsx correctly fetches from /api/admin/analytics and displays all analytics sections
Frontend AdminUserDetailPage.jsx correctly implements inline edit form with all required fields
Frontend AdminUsersPage.jsx has View link per user row that navigates to /admin/users/:userId
seed_data_creation: Created test users for profile update testing (test_profile_* emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 tested Admin Dashboard Upgrade. Key endpoints: 1) GET /api/admin/analytics - returns total_streams, week_streams, total_stream_revenue, platform_breakdown, country_breakdown, top_artists, monthly_trend, active_artists. 2) GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/detail - returns user, stats, releases, platform_breakdown, country_breakdown, weekly_trends, goals. 3) PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id}/profile - updates user profile fields (name, artist_name, bio, genre, country, social links, role, plan, status). Frontend pages: /admin (dashboard with 6 stat cards, analytics charts), /admin/users (user table with View links), /admin/users/:userId (user detail with edit form). All admin endpoints require admin authentication.

mocked_apis.note: Stream data comes from simulated DSP engine (stream_events collection). No mocked APIs.
